source_item.title: RIL Q1 Results: Revenue up 25% YoY to Rs 3.11 lakh crore, profit beats Street estimates

slide1_hook.label: RIL Just Crossed ₹3 Lakh Crore Revenue
slide1_hook.subhead: India's biggest company just hit a record quarter.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: From Oil Refiner to India's Everything Company
slide2_backstory.body: Reliance grew from an oil and textile company into a giant spanning retail, telecom, and energy. Last year's profit also got a one-time boost of Rs 8,924 crore from selling its Asian Paints stake.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Revenue Hits ₹3 Lakh Crore First Time
slide3_news.body: Revenue hit a record ₹3.11 lakh crore this quarter, up 25% year on year, and EBITDA rose 10% to ₹54,067 crore. Net profit fell 22% to ₹20,946 crore, but only because of a one-time gain last year, so core profit still grew.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: Three Big Things To Watch Next
bullets: Jio's ₹37,700 crore IPO could be India's biggest ever
Jio now has 533 million users and rising prices
O2C profit hit a 4-year high, more growth ahead

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: Jio's IPO could value it at $170 billion. Would you buy in, or is that too pricey?
slide5_engage.cta: Follow for daily breakdowns of India's biggest business stories, in plain English.
